title: Method Level 4E — Mastery
summary: Velocity études, perpetual-motion studies, and 8–16 measure grand-staff pieces across all five Level 4 keys at faster tempos.

exercises.title: D Major Velocity Study
exercises.summary: Eight-measure velocity étude in D major with continuous RH eighth-note scale runs.
exercises.goal: Execute D major scale passages at speed with accurate F# and C# throughout.

exercises.title: D Major Grande Étude
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure étude in D major alternating singing melody with eighth-note scale passages.
exercises.goal: Contrast lyrical and running passages in D major across twelve measures.

exercises.title: D Major Perpetual Motion
exercises.summary: Eight-measure perpetual-motion study in D major with unbroken RH eighth-note flow.
exercises.goal: Sustain unbroken eighth-note motion in D major for eight full measures.

exercises.title: A Major Speed Study
exercises.summary: Eight-measure speed study in A major with RH running through the full octave.
exercises.goal: Play A major scale runs at high speed with F#, C#, G# precise throughout.

exercises.title: A Major Scherzo
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure playful scherzo in A major, 3/4 time, with lively eighth-note passages.
exercises.goal: Project a quick, witty scherzo character in A major with crisp articulation.

exercises.title: A Major Grande Pièce
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure grand piece in A major combining lyrical phrases with ascending scale climaxes.
exercises.goal: Shape a full musical arc in A major over twelve measures with both hands.

exercises.title: Bb Major Étude de Vitesse
exercises.summary: Eight-measure speed étude in Bb major with RH running the full octave plus.
exercises.goal: Execute Bb major scale passages at speed with Bb and Eb consistently accurate.

exercises.title: Bb Major Rondo
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure rondo in Bb major with a recurring theme and contrasting episodes.
exercises.goal: Navigate a rondo structure in Bb major with precise returns to the main theme.

exercises.title: Eb Major Velocity Study
exercises.summary: Eight-measure velocity study in Eb major with continuous RH eighth-note runs.
exercises.goal: Execute Eb major passages at speed with Eb, Ab, and Bb accurate throughout.

exercises.title: Eb Major Grande Étude
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure étude in Eb major with broad melodic arcs and flowing eighth-note passages.
exercises.goal: Balance singing melody and scale runs in Eb major over twelve measures.

exercises.title: Ab Major Speed Study
exercises.summary: Eight-measure speed study in Ab major with RH running through all four flats at tempo.
exercises.goal: Execute Ab major passages at speed with Bb, Eb, Ab, Db all consistently placed.

exercises.title: Ab Major Grand Piece
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure grand piece in Ab major with flowing passages and expressive melody.
exercises.goal: Perform a complete musical arc in Ab major maintaining four-flat accuracy at tempo.

exercises.title: D Major Cross-Octave Study
exercises.summary: Ten-measure D major study spanning wide melodic leaps and cross-octave scale passages.
exercises.goal: Navigate D major across two octaves with confident leaps and smooth scale runs.

exercises.title: Sharp Keys Mastery
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure D major piece drawing on A major harmony to explore the circle of fifths.
exercises.goal: Demonstrate mastery of the sharp-key sound world across a twelve-measure musical arc.

exercises.title: Flat Keys Mastery
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure Bb major piece with eighth-note fluency exploring the flat-key harmonic world.
exercises.goal: Demonstrate mastery of the flat-key sound world across a twelve-measure musical arc.

exercises.title: Ab Major Capstone Étude
exercises.summary: Ten-measure capstone étude in Ab major with flowing eighth-note passages and lyrical climax.
exercises.goal: Demonstrate complete Ab major fluency across ten measures at a fluent tempo.

exercises.title: D Major Brilliant Étude
exercises.summary: Ten-measure brilliant étude in D major at the fastest L4 tempo with wide-range runs.
exercises.goal: Execute continuous D major passages with brilliance and precision across ten measures.

exercises.title: A Major Mastery Piece
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure mastery piece in A major reaching the full upper register.
exercises.goal: Demonstrate full A major fluency with three-sharp accuracy across twelve measures.

exercises.title: Bb Major Final Study
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure final study in Bb major with syncopation, eighth-note runs, and a broad climax.
exercises.goal: Integrate all L4E Bb major techniques in a complete twelve-measure musical statement.

exercises.title: L4E Grand Mastery Capstone
exercises.summary: Sixteen-measure capstone in D major showcasing the full range of Level 4E mastery techniques.
exercises.goal: Demonstrate complete Level 4 fluency across sixteen measures with both hands at full tempo.
